action.reasoning: Observation: I'm still getting an IndexError in the DataCollator when trying to pad pixel_values. The error occurs because I'm incorrectly accessing the tensor dimensions. The error message 'Dimension out of range (expected to be in range of [-1, 0], but got 1)' suggests that I'm trying to access dimension 1 when the tensor only has dimensions [-1, 0]. This means the pixel_values tensor might have shape [seq_len] instead of [seq_len, dim] or vice versa. I need to fix the padding logic in the DataCollator to properly handle the pixel_values tensor dimensions. I also need to fix the image path issue that was causing FileNotFoundError.
